response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior IC with broad full-stack and developer-tooling exposure (D test runner Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/DevOps setups, MCP code generators at Stripe), but the role requires a people manager with at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years in technical leadership. The resume shows no people-management experience, no direct reports, and no evidence of leading organizational change. Mobile platform ecosystem experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016). Fit for an IC dev-tools role would be much higher than for this management position.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD, MCP generators
10+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring via workshops, dojos, and Selenium courses
concerns: No formal people-management or direct-report experience listed
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap
Limited recent mobile-platform ecosystem work; most roles are backend/full-stack

key_factors.factor: Strong developer-tools and testing infrastructure background
